name: Summer Squash Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the summer squash and onion in boiling water for 5 minutes.
2. Drain and set aside.
3. Combine the chicken soup and sour cream. Stir in the carrots.
4. Fold in the drained squash and onion.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the stuffing mix and margarine.
6. Spread half of the stuffing mix in the bottom of an 8-inch x 12-inch baking dish.
7. Spoon the vegetable mixture on top.
8. Sprinkle with the remaining stuffing mix.
9. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until heated.
